winning_patterns: explicitly locking the blindfold and uniform in every prompt without exception
dual-source cinematic lighting works perfectly against his dark uniform
skill_patches_applied: Added explicit ban on stripping blindfold and uniform in skill_characters.md

character_quirks_found.Gojo: If blindfold/sunglasses AND uniform are removed simultaneously, the model catastrophically hallucinates a generic K-Pop idol in pseudo-3D. Enforcing at least one signature element locks the 2D cel-shaded style.
